mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EXCHANGE_ORDER ( IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, TRADE_TYPE, FX_SURYO_METHOD, FX_SELLING_METHOD, CURRENCY_CODE, CURRENCY_NAME, FX_ORDER_AMOUNT, FX_TRADING, APPLY_SPREAD, FX_SPECIFIC_ACCOUNT_CODE, FX_DEPOSIT_TYPE, FX_TRADE_SERVICE_TYPE, FX_ORDER_STATUS, FX_CYCLE_NO, FX_EVENT_ID, ORDER_NO, EXEC_DATETIME, STL_DATE, EXCHANGE_RATE, EXCHANGE_RATE_DATETIME, STL_AMOUNT_YEN, ORDER_DATETIME, ORDER_SHUBETSU, API_ERROR_CODE, API_STATUS_CODE, API_MESSAGE, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{req.ifaOrderNo}, '1', #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.tradeCd}, #{req.quantityDesignationMethod}, #{req.saleMethod}, #{req.currencyCode}, #{req.currency}, #{req.fxOrderAmount}, '1', #{req.selectedCurrencyInfo}, #{req.accountClass}, '3', '1', '0', null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.brokerChargeCode}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.userId} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE EXCHANGE_ORDER SET
ORDER_NO = #{req.orderNumber}, EXEC_DATETIME = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{req.tradeDateTime},'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.FF3"+09:00"'), STL_DATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{req.settlementDate},'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYYMMDD'), EXCHANGE_RATE = #{req.fxRate}, EXCHANGE_RATE_DATETIME = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{req.exchangeRateDateTime},'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.FF3"+09:00"'), STL_AMOUNT_YEN = #{req.yenDeliveryAmount}, ORDER_DATETIME = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{req.orderDate},'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.FF6"+09:00"'), ORDER_SHUBETSU = #{req.orderKindDisplay},
API_ERROR_CODE = #{req.apiErrorCode}, API_STATUS_CODE = #{req.apiStatusCode}, API_MESSAGE = SUBSTRB(#{req.apiMsg}, 1, 100), UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, UPDATE_USER = #{req.userId} WHERE IFA_ORDER_NO = #{req.ifaOrderNo} AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = '1'
mapper.select: SELECT IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_EXCHANGE_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 10, '0') AS IFA_ORDER_NO FROM DUAL
